title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Assistant Coach
shortInfo: SAI Recruitment 2026: 100 Assistant Coach vacancies. Apply Offline from 26 May to 27 June 2026 at sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 100 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SAI Recruitment 2026: 100 Assistant Coach vacancies. Apply Offline from 26 May to 27 June 2026 at sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 56 years as on the opening date of receipt of application.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by SAI:

salary_details.salary: Pay Matrix Level-06: ₹35,400–₹1,12,400/- (Pay Band-2, Rs. 9300-34800 + Rs. 4200/- Grade Pay)

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application format (Annexure-I / CV Proforma) from the official SAI website: www.sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in.
Fill out the application completely and attach attested copies of certificates for age, qualifications, and experience.
Enclose the last 5 years' ACRs/APARs duly attested on each page by an officer of Under Secretary rank or above.
Also enclose: Integrity Certificate, Vigilance Clearance, No Penalty Certificate (last 5 years), verification certificate, and Cadre Clearance Certificate.
Submit the application (in duplicate) through proper channel/Cadre Controlling Authority on or before 27.06.2026 by 5:00 PM to:

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application through proper channel is June 27, 2026, by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 100 Assistant Coach posts have been announced by the Sports Authority of India.

faq.question: What is the recruitment method for SAI Assistant Coach posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment will be done on a deputation basis, including short-term contract.

faq.question: What is the salary of an Assistant Coach in SAI?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Level-06 (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400) under Pay Matrix (Pay Band-2 with Grade Pay ₹4200).

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not exceeding 56 years as on the application opening date.

faq.question: What qualifications are required for SAI Assistant Coach posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have either:Diploma in Coaching from SAI NS NIS or equivalent, orParticipation in international events (Olympics/Asian Games etc.) with coaching certification, orBe a Dronacharya Awardee, orMeet SAI sports quota norms

faq.question: Who is eligible to apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates include Central/State Government/UT officers holding analogous posts or with 6 years of service in Level-5 pay scale.

faq.question: Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be posted across India at SAI centres.

seo_tags: Sports Authority of India Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026
